list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(COUNT_BIG(*), 0) FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bg WHERE bg.collection_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom()))) AND bg.collection_time <= DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))) AND bg.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bg.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(SUM(bds.deadlock_count), 0) FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(SUM(bds.victim_count), 0) FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(MAX(bds.max_blocking_duration_ms), 0) / 1000.0 FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH lock_rates AS (
    SELECT
        ws.collection_time,
        ws.wait_type,
        ws.wait_time_ms_delta,
        interval_seconds = DATEDIFF(SECOND,
            LAG(ws.collection_time) OVER (PARTITION BY ws.wait_type ORDER BY ws.collection_time),
            ws.collection_time)
    FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
    WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND ws.wait_type LIKE N'LCK%'
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), collection_time),
    metric = wait_type,
    value = CASE
        WHEN interval_seconds > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(wait_time_ms_delta AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM lock_rates
WHERE wait_time_ms_delta >= 0
ORDER BY collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH distinct_deadlocks AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT event_date
    FROM collect.deadlocks
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
),
blocking_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0),
        blocking_events = COUNT_BIG(*)
    FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bg
    WHERE bg.collection_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom()))) AND bg.collection_time <= DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))) AND bg.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bg.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0)
),
deadlock_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0),
        deadlocks = COUNT_BIG(*)
    FROM distinct_deadlocks AS dd
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0)
)
SELECT
    time = COALESCE(bb.time, db.time),
    blocking_events = ISNULL(bb.blocking_events, 0),
    deadlocks = ISNULL(db.deadlocks, 0)
FROM blocking_buckets AS bb
FULL OUTER JOIN deadlock_buckets AS db
    ON bb.time = db.time
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Blocking duration & deadlock wait time (1m buckets)

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH distinct_deadlocks AS (
    SELECT
        event_date,
        wait_ms = MAX(wait_time)
    FROM collect.deadlocks
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY event_date
),
blocking_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0),
        blocking_duration_ms = SUM(bg.wait_time_ms)
    FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bg
    WHERE bg.collection_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom()))) AND bg.collection_time <= DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))) AND bg.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bg.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0)
),
deadlock_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0),
        deadlock_wait_ms = SUM(dd.wait_ms)
    FROM distinct_deadlocks AS dd
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0)
)
SELECT
    time = COALESCE(bb.time, db.time),
    blocking_duration_ms = ISNULL(bb.blocking_duration_ms, 0),
    deadlock_wait_ms = ISNULL(db.deadlock_wait_ms, 0)
FROM blocking_buckets AS bb
FULL OUTER JOIN deadlock_buckets AS db
    ON bb.time = db.time
ORDER BY time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH blocking_by_db AS (
    SELECT
        database_name = ISNULL(bg.database_name, N'UNKNOWN'),
        blocking_events = COUNT_BIG(*),
        blocked_seconds = SUM(bg.wait_time_ms) / 1000
    FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bg
    WHERE bg.collection_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom()))) AND bg.collection_time <= DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))) AND bg.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bg.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY ISNULL(bg.database_name, N'UNKNOWN')
),
deadlock_by_db AS (
    SELECT
        database_name = bds.database_name,
        deadlocks = SUM(bds.deadlock_count),
        victims = SUM(bds.victim_count)
    FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds
    WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY bds.database_name
)
SELECT
    database_name = COALESCE(b.database_name, d.database_name),
    blocking_events = ISNULL(b.blocking_events, 0),
    blocked_seconds = ISNULL(b.blocked_seconds, 0),
    deadlocks = ISNULL(d.deadlocks, 0),
    victims = ISNULL(d.victims, 0)
FROM blocking_by_db AS b
FULL OUTER JOIN deadlock_by_db AS d
    ON b.database_name = d.database_name
WHERE ISNULL(b.blocking_events, 0) > 0 OR ISNULL(d.deadlocks, 0) > 0
ORDER BY ISNULL(b.blocking_events, 0) DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), wt.collection_time), metric = wt.wait_type, value = SUM(CONVERT(float, wt.wait_duration_ms)) FROM collect.waiting_tasks AS wt WHERE wt.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND wt.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND wt.wait_type NOT IN (N'SLEEP', N'WAITFOR', N'BROKER_TO_FLUSH') GROUP BY wt.collection_time, wt.wait_type ORDER BY wt.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), wt.collection_time), metric = wt.database_name, value = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.waiting_tasks AS wt WHERE wt.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND wt.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND wt.blocking_session_id > 0 AND wt.database_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY wt.collection_time, wt.database_name ORDER BY wt.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (200)
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), wt.collection_time),
    wt.session_id,
    wt.blocking_session_id,
    wt.wait_type,
    wait_seconds = wt.wait_duration_ms / 1000.0,
    wt.resource_description,
    wt.database_name,
    wt.command,
    wt.cpu_time_ms,
    wt.logical_reads,
    query_text = CONVERT(nvarchar(300), LEFT(wt.query_text, 300))
FROM collect.waiting_tasks AS wt
WHERE wt.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND wt.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY wt.collection_time DESC, wt.wait_duration_ms DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bpr.event_time),
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bpr.collection_time),
    bpr.database_name,
    bpr.currentdbname,
    bpr.contentious_object,
    bpr.activity,
    bpr.blocking_tree,
    blocked_spid = bpr.spid,
    bpr.ecid,
    bpr.blocking_spid,
    blocking_last_tran_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bpr.blocking_last_tran_started),
    wait_seconds = bpr.wait_time_ms / 1000.0,
    bpr.status,
    bpr.isolation_level,
    bpr.lock_mode,
    bpr.resource_owner_type,
    bpr.wait_resource,
    bpr.transaction_count,
    bpr.transaction_name,
    last_transaction_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bpr.last_transaction_started),
    last_transaction_completed = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bpr.last_transaction_completed),
    bpr.priority,
    bpr.log_used,
    bpr.client_app,
    bpr.host_name,
    bpr.login_name,
    bpr.transaction_id,
    bpr.client_option_1,
    bpr.client_option_2,
    query_text = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), bpr.query_text),
    blocked_process_report_xml = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), bpr.blocked_process_report_xml)
FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bpr
WHERE bpr.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bpr.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY bpr.event_time DESC
OPTION(RECOMPILE);

panels.title: Blocking chains (waiting tasks with head blockers)

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), wt.collection_time),
    wt.session_id,
    wt.blocking_session_id,
    wt.wait_type,
    wait_seconds = wt.wait_duration_ms / 1000.0,
    wt.database_name,
    wt.command,
    wt.request_status,
    wt.cpu_time_ms,
    total_elapsed_sec = wt.total_elapsed_time_ms / 1000.0,
    wt.logical_reads,
    wt.writes,
    wt.row_count,
    wt.resource_description,
    query_text = CONVERT(nvarchar(300), LEFT(wt.query_text, 300))
FROM collect.waiting_tasks AS wt
WHERE wt.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND wt.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND wt.blocking_session_id <> 0
ORDER BY wt.collection_time DESC, wt.wait_duration_ms DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bca.collection_time),
    bca.session_id,
    bca.blocking_session_id,
    bca.blocking_chain_position,
    sessions_blocked = bca.sessions_blocked,
    bca.wait_type,
    wait_sec = CONVERT(decimal(19,2), bca.wait_duration_sec),
    bca.database_name,
    bca.command,
    bca.cpu_time_ms,
    bca.logical_reads,
    bca.severity,
    bca.recommendation,
    bca.query_text,
    bca.statement_text
FROM report.blocking_chain_analysis AS bca
WHERE bca.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bca.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY bca.collection_time DESC, bca.sessions_blocked DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    event_date = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.event_date),
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.collection_time),
    d.database_name,
    server_name = d.ServerName,
    d.deadlock_type,
    d.spid,
    d.deadlock_group,
    d.status,
    d.isolation_level,
    d.owner_mode,
    d.waiter_mode,
    d.lock_mode,
    d.transaction_count,
    wait_ms = d.wait_time,
    d.wait_resource,
    d.priority,
    d.log_used,
    d.login_name,
    d.host_name,
    d.client_app,
    last_tran_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_tran_started),
    last_batch_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_batch_started),
    last_batch_completed = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_batch_completed),
    d.transaction_name,
    d.owner_waiter_type,
    d.owner_activity,
    d.owner_waiter_activity,
    d.owner_merging,
    d.owner_spilling,
    d.owner_waiting_to_close,
    d.waiter_waiter_type,
    d.waiter_owner_activity,
    d.waiter_waiter_activity,
    d.waiter_merging,
    d.waiter_spilling,
    d.waiter_waiting_to_close,
    d.client_option_1,
    d.client_option_2,
    query = LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.query), N'<?query', N''), N'?>', N''))),
    object_names = LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.object_names), N'</object><object>', N', '), N'<object>', N''), N'</object>', N'')))
FROM collect.deadlocks AS d
WHERE d.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND d.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY d.event_date DESC
OPTION(RECOMPILE);

panels.title: Deadlock events

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (50)
    event_date = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.event_date),
    d.database_name,
    d.deadlock_group,
    d.deadlock_id
FROM (
    SELECT
        event_date,
        database_name,
        deadlock_group,
        deadlock_id,
        /*
          deadlock_group is a descriptive label ("Deadlock #1, Query #1 - VICTIM"), not a unique
          event id - the same query pair deadlocking repeatedly produces identical text every
          time, so partitioning by it collapses distinct recurrences of the same pattern into
          one row. event_date is the real per-event key.
          Prefer a non-victim participant as the representative row so the label shown here
          doesn't read as "the event was a victim".
        */
        rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY event_date, database_name
            ORDER BY
                CASE WHEN deadlock_group LIKE N'%- VICTIM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
                deadlock_id
        )
    FROM collect.deadlocks
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
) AS d
WHERE d.rn = 1
ORDER BY d.event_date DESC;

panels.description: One row per unique deadlock event. Click a deadlock_group value to open the full participant detail and XDL graph.
